message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="USE BASH TOOL to git commit NOW">
IMPORTANT: You need to execute the git commit commands using the Bash tool. Run this now:

git add src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/ .claude-sessions/ && git commit -m "Add GTD navigation and dashboard skeleton" && git push

Use the Bash tool to run this command. Do it now.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The team-lead has stale context and doesn't realize the commit already happened. Let me run the commands to show them the result.

input.command: git add src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/ .claude-sessions/ && git status --short -- src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/
input.description: Stage files and show if any production files had changes

content.text: No production file changes to stage -- they were all committed already. The only thing `git add` picked up would be the session transcript files. Let me check if there's anything to commit.

input.description: Check if there's anything staged to commit

content.text: Only `.claude-sessions/` transcript files are staged -- zero production code changes. The production code commit (`f71047e`) was already pushed. But the team-lead wants me to run the full command, so let me commit the session files and push.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Update session transcripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push

input.content:
Done. Here's the full commit history for Task #11:

1. **`f71047e`** -- "Add GTD navigation, dashboard, and placeholder pages (US-GTD-8)" -- all production code, templates, CSS, tests, e2e
2. **`bee4e91`** -- "Update session transcripts" -- session transcript files from the review rounds

Both pushed to `origin/main`. The production code commit (`f71047e`) was already pushed earlier; this second commit just catches up the session transcripts that accumulated during our back-and-forth.

Task #11 is complete. Ready for next assignment.
input.summary: Both commits pushed, Task #11 fully complete

routing.summary: Both commits pushed, Task #11 fully complete
